steps: Go to https://developer.surveymonkey.com/apps/ and log in with your SurveyMonkey account
Enter an App Nickname and click 'Create App'
In your app settings, go to the 'Credentials' tab to find your Client ID and Client Secret
Go to the 'Settings' tab and add your OAuth Redirect URI (the callback URL for your application)
Go to the 'Scopes' tab and select the required scopes (surveys_read, surveys_write, responses_read, etc.), then click 'Update Scopes'
Use the Client ID and Secret to implement the OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow against https://api.surveymonkey.com/oauth/authorize

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Client ID
credential_fields.description: Your SurveyMonkey OAuth app Client ID, found in the Credentials tab of your app at developer.surveymonkey.com

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: Client Secret
credential_fields.description: Your SurveyMonkey OAuth app Client Secret, found in the Credentials tab of your app at developer.surveymonkey.com

notes: A free SurveyMonkey account is required; some API features require a paid plan (Advantage or Premier)
OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow is used — a redirect URI must be registered in your app settings
Private apps can use a personal access token (also in the Credentials tab) to skip the OAuth flow for personal use
Scopes must be explicitly selected in your app's Scopes tab before they can be requested during OAuth
Rate limit: 120 requests per minute on free plans; higher on paid plans

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the current authenticated user's profile to verify OAuth credentials
